channel.title: Exit Liquidity
channel.description: Exit Liquidity is where we break down the latest crypto metas and market meltdowns, straight from the trenches. No VC fluff, no hopium, just unfiltered content. We dig into how crypto keeps reinventing the rules: from the chains and protocols reshaping finance, to the narratives, ponzis, and builders pushing Web3 forward (or backward). If it pumps, rugs, forks, or trends then we’re talking about it. The space moves fast, and so do we.
channel.author: Trendy & Zerk
channel.itunes:author: Trendy & Zerk
channel.itunes:summary: Exit Liquidity is where we break down the latest crypto metas and market meltdowns, straight from the trenches. No VC fluff, no hopium, just unfiltered content. We dig into how crypto keeps reinventing the rules: from the chains and protocols reshaping finance, to the narratives, ponzis, and builders pushing Web3 forward (or backward). If it pumps, rugs, forks, or trends then we’re talking about it. The space moves fast, and so do we.

item.title: Episode 44 - Knocking off the Rust
item.description: In this engaging conversation, Zerk and Trendy explore the latest trends in crypto markets, the impact of geopolitical events, and the evolving role of AI in blockchain technology. They share insights on market strategies, meme coin trading, and the future of blockchain ecosystems, providing valuable perspectives for crypto enthusiasts and investors.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, Zerk and Trendy explore the latest trends in crypto markets, the impact of geopolitical events, and the evolving role of AI in blockchain technology. They share insights on market strategies, meme coin trading, and the future of blockchain ecosystems, providing valuable perspectives for crypto enthusiasts and investors.
item.itunes:title: Episode 44 - Knocking off the Rust

item.title: Episode 43 - All the alpha on Hyperlend
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the latest developments in the cryptocurrency space, focusing on Hyperland and its lending and borrowing protocol, Hyperlend. They explore the mission of Hyperland, its compliance with institutional standards, and how it compares to other protocols like Aave. The discussion also covers the recent token drop, the future of Hyperlend, and the potential for integrating AI and expanding services to retail users. Ness, from Hyperland, shares insights on the challenges and successes of building in the DeFi space, emphasizing the importance of security and user engagement.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the latest developments in the cryptocurrency space, focusing on Hyperland and its lending and borrowing protocol, Hyperlend. They explore the mission of Hyperland, its compliance with institutional standards, and how it compares to other protocols like Aave. The discussion also covers the recent token drop, the future of Hyperlend, and the potential for integrating AI and expanding services to retail users. Ness, from Hyperland, shares insights on the challenges and successes of building in the DeFi space, emphasizing the importance of security and user engagement.
item.itunes:title: Episode 43 - All the alpha on Hyperlend

item.title: Episode 42 - Jeffrey Epstein is Satoshi?
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from personal updates to the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They explore the reasons behind market fluctuations, share insights on trading strategies, and delve into the development of AI projects. The discussion also touches on investment predictions and the role of memes in the crypto space, culminating in a light-hearted exchange about their experiences and thoughts on the future of trading and technology.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from personal updates to the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They explore the reasons behind market fluctuations, share insights on trading strategies, and delve into the development of AI projects. The discussion also touches on investment predictions and the role of memes in the crypto space, culminating in a light-hearted exchange about their experiences and thoughts on the future of trading and technology.
item.itunes:title: Episode 42 - Jeffrey Epstein is Satoshi?

item.title: Episode 41 - Metals Meltdown
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's fluctuations, the implications of the new Federal Reserve chair, and the recent crash in the metals market. They also delve into the $BIRD airdrop update, the rise of AI bots and Moltbook, and the potential future of AI technology. The discussion highlights the importance of security in AI interactions and the economic implications of these developments, concluding with thoughts on investment strategies and market predictions.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's fluctuations, the implications of the new Federal Reserve chair, and the recent crash in the metals market. They also delve into the $BIRD airdrop update, the rise of AI bots and Moltbook, and the potential future of AI technology. The discussion highlights the importance of security in AI interactions and the economic implications of these developments, concluding with thoughts on investment strategies and market predictions.
item.itunes:title: Episode 41 - Metals Meltdown

item.title: Episode 40 - Clawdbot, The Rise of the Dev
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics including the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin and Hyperliquid, the implications of the Bird Token and Moonbirds, the performance of precious metals, and the advancements in AI technology with Clawdbot. They explore the potential future of work in an AI-driven world and the importance of adapting to these changes.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics including the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin and Hyperliquid, the implications of the Bird Token and Moonbirds, the performance of precious metals, and the advancements in AI technology with Clawdbot. They explore the potential future of work in an AI-driven world and the importance of adapting to these changes.
item.itunes:title: Episode 40 - Clawdbot, The Rise of the Dev

item.title: Episode 39 - Tariffs Cancelled?
item.description: In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Bitcoin's performance and notable gainers. They delve into the implications of tariffs on the economy, the recent Seeker Airdrop, and the acquisition of Farcaster. The conversation also touches on emerging tokens and market speculations, highlighting the unpredictable nature of the crypto landscape.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Bitcoin's performance and notable gainers. They delve into the implications of tariffs on the economy, the recent Seeker Airdrop, and the acquisition of Farcaster. The conversation also touches on emerging tokens and market speculations, highlighting the unpredictable nature of the crypto landscape.
item.itunes:title: Episode 39 - Tariffs Cancelled?

item.title: Episode 38 - That $COW is Ded
item.description: In this episode, Trendy and Zerk reconnect after a brief hiatus, diving into the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They discuss Bitcoin's recent fluctuations, the rise of certain altcoins like Tezos and Midnight, and the impact of geopolitical events on market sentiment. The conversation shifts to the ongoing meme coin phenomenon, highlighting the volatility and excitement surrounding these tokens, as well as the risks involved. Zerk shares his experience with a recent meme coin that saw significant gains before a sudden drop, illustrating the unpredictable nature of the market. They also touch on the implications of the NASDAQ's move towards 24/7 trading and how it could influence the crypto landscape, emphasizing the need for caution and strategic decision-making in trading.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this episode, Trendy and Zerk reconnect after a brief hiatus, diving into the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They discuss Bitcoin's recent fluctuations, the rise of certain altcoins like Tezos and Midnight, and the impact of geopolitical events on market sentiment. The conversation shifts to the ongoing meme coin phenomenon, highlighting the volatility and excitement surrounding these tokens, as well as the risks involved. Zerk shares his experience with a recent meme coin that saw significant gains before a sudden drop, illustrating the unpredictable nature of the market. They also touch on the implications of the NASDAQ's move towards 24/7 trading and how it could influence the crypto landscape, emphasizing the need for caution and strategic decision-making in trading.
item.itunes:title: Episode 38 - That $COW is Ded

item.title: Episode 37 - MEGAHYPE'd w/ Nest
item.description: In this inaugural episode of the show, hosts Zerk and Trendy dive into the world of cryptocurrency, focusing on the latest developments in Bitcoin mining and the market landscape. Trendy shares his excitement about acquiring a new Bitcoin miner, the S21XP, which significantly boosts his mining capabilities. The conversation quickly shifts to a market overview, highlighting Bitcoin's current price and discussing various tokens, including Humanity Protocol and Kaito. The hosts express their anticipation for the upcoming discussion with Ace from Nest, a platform that aims to innovate in the decentralized exchange (DEX) space. As the episode progresses, Ace elaborates on the concept of MetaDEXes, explaining how they address the DEX trilemma by catering to the needs of traders, liquidity providers, and token holders. He discusses the unique features of Nest Exchange, including its approach to liquidity and revenue distribution. The conversation also touches on the competitive landscape of DEXs, comparing Nest to established platforms like Uniswap and Curve. Ace emphasizes the importance of community-driven development and the potential for growth in the DeFi space, particularly with the upcoming launch of the MegaHype token, which aims to enhance user engagement and value capture within the ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this inaugural episode of the show, hosts Zerk and Trendy dive into the world of cryptocurrency, focusing on the latest developments in Bitcoin mining and the market landscape. Trendy shares his excitement about acquiring a new Bitcoin miner, the S21XP, which significantly boosts his mining capabilities. The conversation quickly shifts to a market overview, highlighting Bitcoin's current price and discussing various tokens, including Humanity Protocol and Kaito. The hosts express their anticipation for the upcoming discussion with Ace from Nest, a platform that aims to innovate in the decentralized exchange (DEX) space. As the episode progresses, Ace elaborates on the concept of MetaDEXes, explaining how they address the DEX trilemma by catering to the needs of traders, liquidity providers, and token holders. He discusses the unique features of Nest Exchange, including its approach to liquidity and revenue distribution. The conversation also touches on the competitive landscape of DEXs, comparing Nest to established platforms like Uniswap and Curve. Ace emphasizes the importance of community-driven development and the potential for growth in the DeFi space, particularly with the upcoming launch of the MegaHype token, which aims to enhance user engagement and value capture within the ecosystem.
item.itunes:title: Episode 37 - MEGAHYPE'd w/ Nest

item.title: Episode 36 - Nikita vs CT
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the advancements in VibeCoding, the current state of the cryptocurrency market, particularly Bitcoin and privacy coins, and the implications of recent controversies surrounding Nikita and Crypto Twitter. They also delve into mining strategies, the role of memes in market trends, and J-Pow's stance on interest rates amidst economic challenges. The dialogue reflects a blend of humor and insightful analysis, making it engaging for listeners interested in the crypto space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the advancements in VibeCoding, the current state of the cryptocurrency market, particularly Bitcoin and privacy coins, and the implications of recent controversies surrounding Nikita and Crypto Twitter. They also delve into mining strategies, the role of memes in market trends, and J-Pow's stance on interest rates amidst economic challenges. The dialogue reflects a blend of humor and insightful analysis, making it engaging for listeners interested in the crypto space.
item.itunes:title: Episode 36 - Nikita vs CT

item.title: Episode 35 - Sam Bankman NOT Fried
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from the complexities of hockey to the latest trends in the Bitcoin market. They explore innovative solutions for Bitcoin mining, including a new water heater that can mine Bitcoin while heating water. The discussion also touches on political implications in the crypto space, along with Sam Bankman-Fried and Donald Trump. Additionally, they delve into the world of meme coins, market trends, and the recent developments surrounding Zcash and oil prices.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from the complexities of hockey to the latest trends in the Bitcoin market. They explore innovative solutions for Bitcoin mining, including a new water heater that can mine Bitcoin while heating water. The discussion also touches on political implications in the crypto space, along with Sam Bankman-Fried and Donald Trump. Additionally, they delve into the world of meme coins, market trends, and the recent developments surrounding Zcash and oil prices.
item.itunes:title: Episode 35 - Sam Bankman NOT Fried

item.title: Episode 34 - Discord IPO & Seeker AirDrop
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics ranging from the potential alternate ending of Stranger Things to the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They delve into the Discord IPO, the upcoming Seeker AirDrop, Nike's sale of RTFKT, and the emergence of Rumble as a content creation platform. The discussion highlights the interplay between market trends, geopolitical tensions, and community engagement in the crypto space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics ranging from the potential alternate ending of Stranger Things to the current state of the cryptocurrency market. They delve into the Discord IPO, the upcoming Seeker AirDrop, Nike's sale of RTFKT, and the emergence of Rumble as a content creation platform. The discussion highlights the interplay between market trends, geopolitical tensions, and community engagement in the crypto space.
item.itunes:title: Episode 34 - Discord IPO & Seeker AirDrop

item.title: Episode 33- Sphinx, Onchain Orange Juice
item.description: In this engaging conversation, the hosts and their guests from Sphinx Protocol delve into the current state of the cryptocurrency and commodities markets. They discuss the importance of bringing commodities trading onchain, the challenges faced in this endeavor, and the potential for democratizing access to these markets. The guests share their backgrounds in crypto and commodities, highlighting their vision for Sphinx as a platform that aims to revolutionize how commodities are traded. The discussion also touches on predictions for the future of commodities and cryptocurrencies, emphasizing the growing interest from institutional players and the need for innovative trading solutions.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, the hosts and their guests from Sphinx Protocol delve into the current state of the cryptocurrency and commodities markets. They discuss the importance of bringing commodities trading onchain, the challenges faced in this endeavor, and the potential for democratizing access to these markets. The guests share their backgrounds in crypto and commodities, highlighting their vision for Sphinx as a platform that aims to revolutionize how commodities are traded. The discussion also touches on predictions for the future of commodities and cryptocurrencies, emphasizing the growing interest from institutional players and the need for innovative trading solutions.
item.itunes:title: Episode 33- Sphinx, Onchain Orange Juice

item.title: Episode 32 - Memes and NFT's? Oh My!
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk reflect on their New Year celebrations, discuss the current state of the market, and explore the resurgence of meme coins and NFTs. They analyze indicators of market turnaround, the impact of Vitalik's actions on NFTs, and the future of creator coins. The discussion also touches on the importance of privacy in crypto and concludes with predictions for the market's direction.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk reflect on their New Year celebrations, discuss the current state of the market, and explore the resurgence of meme coins and NFTs. They analyze indicators of market turnaround, the impact of Vitalik's actions on NFTs, and the future of creator coins. The discussion also touches on the importance of privacy in crypto and concludes with predictions for the market's direction.
item.itunes:title: Episode 32 - Memes and NFT's? Oh My!

item.title: Episode 31 - Year-end Award Show
item.description: In this conversation, the hosts discuss various topics related to the crypto market, including the quality of drinking water, the current state of cryptocurrency, social media engagement, and significant events in the crypto space. They award titles such as 'Rug of the Year' to the Melania token and 'Airdrop of the Year' to Lighter, while also analyzing the performance of different ecosystems like Solana, Hyperliquid, and Ethereum. They analyze market trends, ecosystem developments, and make predictions for 2026, emphasizing the importance of community and innovation in the crypto space. The discussion also touches on the role of institutions in shaping the future of cryptocurrencies and the potential for airdrops in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, the hosts discuss various topics related to the crypto market, including the quality of drinking water, the current state of cryptocurrency, social media engagement, and significant events in the crypto space. They award titles such as 'Rug of the Year' to the Melania token and 'Airdrop of the Year' to Lighter, while also analyzing the performance of different ecosystems like Solana, Hyperliquid, and Ethereum. They analyze market trends, ecosystem developments, and make predictions for 2026, emphasizing the importance of community and innovation in the crypto space. The discussion also touches on the role of institutions in shaping the future of cryptocurrencies and the potential for airdrops in the coming year.
item.itunes:title: Episode 31 - Year-end Award Show

item.title: Episode 30 - We're back
item.description: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from their holiday experiences to the current state of the crypto market and precious metals. They delve into the recent shutdown of NFT raffle platform Subber, the importance of real community in the NFT space, and insights into silver and precious metals trading. The duo also touches on the rise and fall of creator coins and wraps up with a teaser for their upcoming year-end wrap-up episode.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss a variety of topics ranging from their holiday experiences to the current state of the crypto market and precious metals. They delve into the recent shutdown of NFT raffle platform Subber, the importance of real community in the NFT space, and insights into silver and precious metals trading. The duo also touches on the rise and fall of creator coins and wraps up with a teaser for their upcoming year-end wrap-up episode.
item.itunes:title: Episode 30 - We're back

item.title: Exit Liquidity - HypurrFi Everything
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk, along with guests from HypurrFi, discuss the current state of the crypto market, highlight innovative features of the HypurrFi platform, and emphasize the importance of community engagement and security when onboarding new users. They also explore the future of on-chain payments, the role of incentives in user retention, and share perspectives on market trends and the broader direction of the crypto industry.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk, along with guests from HypurrFi, discuss the current state of the crypto market, highlight innovative features of the HypurrFi platform, and emphasize the importance of community engagement and security when onboarding new users. They also explore the future of on-chain payments, the role of incentives in user retention, and share perspectives on market trends and the broader direction of the crypto industry.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - HypurrFi Everything

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Building a Web3 Game
item.description: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, touching on Bitcoin's fluctuations and the rise of commodities. They introduce their guest, Abstrct, the president of Slow Ninja Gaming, who shares his journey from information security to blockchain gaming. The discussion delves into the challenges of blockchain gaming, the innovative mechanics of Structs, and the importance of community involvement in gaming. Abstrct emphasizes the need for usability and accessibility in games, aiming to create a fun experience that integrates blockchain technology seamlessly.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, touching on Bitcoin's fluctuations and the rise of commodities. They introduce their guest, Abstrct, the president of Slow Ninja Gaming, who shares his journey from information security to blockchain gaming. The discussion delves into the challenges of blockchain gaming, the innovative mechanics of Structs, and the importance of community involvement in gaming. Abstrct emphasizes the need for usability and accessibility in games, aiming to create a fun experience that integrates blockchain technology seamlessly.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Building a Web3 Game

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Price Manipulation
item.description: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on market manipulation, trading strategies, and the implications of new platforms like Dare Markets. They explore the performance of Bitcoin and silver, the Hyperliquid token burn proposal, and the potential for future market trends. The discussion highlights the challenges and opportunities within the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of informed trading decisions and market awareness.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on market manipulation, trading strategies, and the implications of new platforms like Dare Markets. They explore the performance of Bitcoin and silver, the Hyperliquid token burn proposal, and the potential for future market trends. The discussion highlights the challenges and opportunities within the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of informed trading decisions and market awareness.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Price Manipulation

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Diving into NFTs
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's performance and the implications of Michael Saylor's investment strategies. They transition into a deep dive on NFTs, exploring their significance as a gateway to Web3 and the importance of community involvement. The discussion culminates in predictions for the future of NFTs, emphasizing the need for privacy and the value of provenance in digital assets.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's performance and the implications of Michael Saylor's investment strategies. They transition into a deep dive on NFTs, exploring their significance as a gateway to Web3 and the importance of community involvement. The discussion culminates in predictions for the future of NFTs, emphasizing the need for privacy and the value of provenance in digital assets.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Diving into NFTs

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Friday Night Chat
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's performance, the Doodles Doopeies collection, and the dynamics of NFTs. They explore Solana's recent developments, the controversy surrounding Do Kwon, and upcoming ICOs. The discussion also touches on wallet integrations and user experiences in the crypto space, providing insights into market trends and predictions.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, focusing on Bitcoin's performance, the Doodles Doopeies collection, and the dynamics of NFTs. They explore Solana's recent developments, the controversy surrounding Do Kwon, and upcoming ICOs. The discussion also touches on wallet integrations and user experiences in the crypto space, providing insights into market trends and predictions.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Friday Night Chat

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Pokemon Power
item.description: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the crypto market, including recent rate cuts and their implications. They delve into the Doodles Doopies collection, critiquing the management and marketing strategies of the Doodles NFT project. The discussion then shifts to on-chain collectibles, particularly focusing on Pokemon cards and the platforms facilitating their trade, highlighting the potential for bridging Web2 and Web3.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the crypto market, including recent rate cuts and their implications. They delve into the Doodles Doopies collection, critiquing the management and marketing strategies of the Doodles NFT project. The discussion then shifts to on-chain collectibles, particularly focusing on Pokemon cards and the platforms facilitating their trade, highlighting the potential for bridging Web2 and Web3.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Pokemon Power

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Are We Cooked?
item.description:
The hosts break down the current crypto landscape, centering on Bitcoin’s recent price action and shifting market sentiment. They connect these moves to broader economic indicators—like retail spending and job data—that are shaping investor confidence. The conversation highlights major figures such as Michael Saylor and projects like Doodles, noting both the opportunities and the challenges facing NFTs and the wider crypto ecosystem.

They explore minting strategies, investment approaches, and the rise of Web3 gaming as a new growth sector. Along the way, they share personal stories about rug pulls and how those experiences influence their risk management. Overall, the tone is a blend of cautious optimism and realism, with an emphasis on upcoming economic reports as key drivers of the next market direction.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
The hosts break down the current crypto landscape, centering on Bitcoin’s recent price action and shifting market sentiment. They connect these moves to broader economic indicators—like retail spending and job data—that are shaping investor confidence. The conversation highlights major figures such as Michael Saylor and projects like Doodles, noting both the opportunities and the challenges facing NFTs and the wider crypto ecosystem.

They explore minting strategies, investment approaches, and the rise of Web3 gaming as a new growth sector. Along the way, they share personal stories about rug pulls and how those experiences influence their risk management. Overall, the tone is a blend of cautious optimism and realism, with an emphasis on upcoming economic reports as key drivers of the next market direction.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Are We Cooked?

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Precious Metals & UFD w/ Ron
item.description: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the intersection of precious metals and cryptocurrency with Ron, a specialist in both fields. They explore Ron's journey from trading gold and silver to becoming involved in the crypto space, particularly meme coins. The discussion delves into the value of silver and gold, investment strategies, market dynamics, and the importance of community in the crypto ecosystem. Ron shares insights on the future of both precious metals and cryptocurrencies, emphasizing the potential for value creation and the need for a supportive community.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the intersection of precious metals and cryptocurrency with Ron, a specialist in both fields. They explore Ron's journey from trading gold and silver to becoming involved in the crypto space, particularly meme coins. The discussion delves into the value of silver and gold, investment strategies, market dynamics, and the importance of community in the crypto ecosystem. Ron shares insights on the future of both precious metals and cryptocurrencies, emphasizing the potential for value creation and the need for a supportive community.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Precious Metals & UFD w/ Ron

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Prediction Market Meta
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on institutional entries and the rise of prediction markets. They explore how major financial institutions are beginning to invest in cryptocurrencies, the dynamics of prediction markets compared to meme coins, and the implications of media partnerships on market behavior. The discussion also touches on the competitive landscape between platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi, and the potential future of prediction markets in the evolving financial technology space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on institutional entries and the rise of prediction markets. They explore how major financial institutions are beginning to invest in cryptocurrencies, the dynamics of prediction markets compared to meme coins, and the implications of media partnerships on market behavior. The discussion also touches on the competitive landscape between platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi, and the potential future of prediction markets in the evolving financial technology space.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Prediction Market Meta

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Cyber Monday Madness
item.description:
Summary

In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent price movements, the implications of MicroStrategy's Bitcoin holdings, and the overall sentiment among retail investors. They explore the dynamics of bear markets, trading strategies, and the potential for future opportunities. The conversation also touches on retail trends, economic indicators, and the fun side of meme coins, concluding with thoughts on market outlook and upcoming topics for future discussions.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
Summary

In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent price movements, the implications of MicroStrategy's Bitcoin holdings, and the overall sentiment among retail investors. They explore the dynamics of bear markets, trading strategies, and the potential for future opportunities. The conversation also touches on retail trends, economic indicators, and the fun side of meme coins, concluding with thoughts on market outlook and upcoming topics for future discussions.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Cyber Monday Madness

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Hyperliquid Update
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market following Thanksgiving, including market trends, predictions for December, and a deep dive into specific projects like Monad and Hyperliquid. They explore the unique features and success of Hyperliquid, emphasizing its fast transaction speeds and effective tokenomics. The discussion also touches on the broader implications of decentralized exchanges and the future of trading in the crypto space. In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the innovative features of Hyperliquid, particularly the Builder Codes that allow seamless integration with various wallets like Phantom. They explore the user experience of Phantom compared to other wallets, the dynamics of spot trading on Hyperliquid, and the future prospects of the platform amidst market fluctuations. The discussion emphasizes the importance of user experience, market sentiment, and the potential for growth in the crypto space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market following Thanksgiving, including market trends, predictions for December, and a deep dive into specific projects like Monad and Hyperliquid. They explore the unique features and success of Hyperliquid, emphasizing its fast transaction speeds and effective tokenomics. The discussion also touches on the broader implications of decentralized exchanges and the future of trading in the crypto space. In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the innovative features of Hyperliquid, particularly the Builder Codes that allow seamless integration with various wallets like Phantom. They explore the user experience of Phantom compared to other wallets, the dynamics of spot trading on Hyperliquid, and the future prospects of the platform amidst market fluctuations. The discussion emphasizes the importance of user experience, market sentiment, and the potential for growth in the crypto space.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Hyperliquid Update

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Tokenized Labubus with Prof K
item.description:
Summary

In this engaging conversation, they delve into the current state of the cryptocurrency market, particularly Bitcoin, and explore conspiracy theories surrounding market movements. The discussion shifts to Real World Assets (RWAs), emphasizing the importance of tokenization and the challenges faced in this emerging field. The conversation concludes with insights into Mantra's innovative plans for a stablecoin and the future of commodities in the blockchain space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:

In this engaging conversation, they delve into the current state of the cryptocurrency market, particularly Bitcoin, and explore conspiracy theories surrounding market movements. The conversation concludes with insights into Mantra's innovative plans for a stablecoin and the future of commodities in the blockchain space.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Tokenized Labubus with Prof K

item.title: Exit Liquidity - JP Morgan vs Strategy B
item.description: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent performance, the implications of JP Morgan's shorting strategy on MicroStrategy, and the excitement surrounding the Monad airdrop. They delve into trading strategies, the dynamics of meme coins, and the potential of prediction markets to engage users. The discussion also touches on the controversies surrounding the Pump Fund and the governance challenges faced by Stargaze in the Cosmos ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent performance, the implications of JP Morgan's shorting strategy on MicroStrategy, and the excitement surrounding the Monad airdrop. They delve into trading strategies, the dynamics of meme coins, and the potential of prediction markets to engage users. The discussion also touches on the controversies surrounding the Pump Fund and the governance challenges faced by Stargaze in the Cosmos ecosystem.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - JP Morgan vs Strategy B

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Black Friday Deals?
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent price drop and the overall sentiment of extreme fear among investors. They explore various factors contributing to the market dynamics, including speculation about market manipulation, the implications of MicroStrategy's potential delisting from major indexes, and predictions about a possible bear market. The importance of community support in navigating the volatile crypto landscape is also emphasized, along with investment strategies and the need for a balanced perspective during downturns.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent price drop and the overall sentiment of extreme fear among investors. The importance of community support in navigating the volatile crypto landscape is also emphasized, along with investment strategies and the need for a balanced perspective during downturns.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Black Friday Deals?

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Quantum Fears?
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, analyzing metrics such as market cap, the fear and greed index, and the performance of various tokens. They explore investment strategies, the impact of emerging technologies like quantum computing, and the potential future of the market. The discussion highlights the challenges and opportunities within the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of staying informed and adaptable in a rapidly changing environment.

item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Quantum Fears?

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Zcash Eco Growth
item.description: In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss their weekend experiences, including car troubles and the current state of the crypto market. They delve into the recent Coinbase Monad ICO, the Zcash ecosystem, and the importance of privacy in cryptocurrency. The conversation also touches on the challenges faced by privacy chains and the potential for growth in the NFT space.

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Buy Spot & Chill, NFA.
item.description:
Summary

In this episode, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin's recent price fluctuations, investment strategies, and emerging tokens. They explore the dynamics of market sentiment, the impact of traditional markets on crypto, and the importance of risk management. The conversation also delves into the latest developments in NFTs and various marketplaces, highlighting community engagement and project updates. The hosts conclude with their predictions for the market and advice for listeners.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk

The conversation also delves into the latest developments in NFTs and various marketplaces, highlighting community engagement and project updates. item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Buy Spot & Chill, NFA.

item.title: Exit Liquidity - DEX Wars
item.description:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Bitcoin's price predictions, economic factors affecting consumer behavior, and the impact of government policies. They delve into the fast food industry's struggles, the developments in the crypto ecosystem, and the competition between decentralized exchanges like Uniswap and Aerodrome. The conversation also touches on BANKR bot and the role of AI in facilitating crypto transactions and concludes with thoughts on future market trends and ICOs.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Bitcoin's price predictions, economic factors affecting consumer behavior, and the impact of government policies. They delve into the fast food industry's struggles, the developments in the crypto ecosystem, and the competition between decentralized exchanges like Uniswap and Aerodrome. The conversation also touches on BANKR bot and the role of AI in facilitating crypto transactions and concludes with thoughts on future market trends and ICOs.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - DEX Wars

item.title: Exit Liquidity - ICO SZN
item.description:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics related to the cryptocurrency market, including current market trends between Bitcoin and altcoins, as well as the potential effects of government stimulus on crypto investments. They also delve into Coinbase's relaunch of its ICO platform, investment strategies for new tokens, and the implications of sports gambling on the market. The discussion highlights the importance of user experience in both crypto and media apps, and they conclude with predictions for Bitcoin's future.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics related to the cryptocurrency market, including current market trends between Bitcoin and altcoins, as well as the potential effects of government stimulus on crypto investments. They also delve into Coinbase's relaunch of its ICO platform, investment strategies for new tokens, and the implications of sports gambling on the market. The discussion highlights the importance of user experience in both crypto and media apps, and they conclude with predictions for Bitcoin's future.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - ICO SZN

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Bullish vs Bearish
item.description: In this conversation, Zerk and Trendy discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on recent trends, mining profitability, market sentiment, and upcoming projects. They explore the performance of various coins, including Zcash and Bitcoin, and delve into the implications of market fear and greed. The duo also shares insights on mining equipment, electricity costs, and the risks associated with scams in the crypto space. Overall, the discussion provides a comprehensive overview of the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency investments and market dynamics.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk

item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Bullish vs Bearish

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Down Bad
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, analyzing recent trends, market reactions to events, and the psychological factors influencing investor behavior. They explore the impact of hacks on market trust, macroeconomic influences, and investment strategies during downturns. The discussion also touches on emerging opportunities in privacy coins and the correlation between tech stocks and crypto. Overall, the conversation provides insights into navigating the volatile crypto landscape and making informed investment decisions.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk

They explore the impact of hacks on market trust, macroeconomic influences, and investment strategies during downturns. The discussion also touches on emerging opportunities in privacy coins and the correlation between tech stocks and crypto. Overall, the conversation provides insights into navigating the volatile crypto landscape and making informed investment decisions.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Down Bad

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Zerk at Cosmoverse
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Halloween festivities, market trends, and the influence of institutional players. They delve into Zerk's recent experience at Cosmosverse in Croatia, exploring the challenges faced by the Cosmos ecosystem and the Atom token. The discussion also touches on community dynamics, emerging projects, and the potential of prediction markets.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the crypto market, including Halloween festivities, market trends, and the influence of institutional players. They delve into Zerk's recent experience at Cosmosverse in Croatia, exploring the challenges faced by the Cosmos ecosystem and the Atom token. The discussion also touches on community dynamics, emerging projects, and the potential of prediction markets.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Zerk at Cosmoverse

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Western Union?
item.description:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss their recent experiences, including a flight to Croatia and the current state of the crypto market. They delve into various topics such as market trends, the impact of Western Union's blockchain partnerships, the competition between privacy coins like Zcash and Monero, insights from the Cosmoverse conference, and the excitement surrounding NFTs and new opportunities in the crypto space. They also touch on the MetaMask farming campaign and the Mega ETH sale, exploring the dynamics of market manipulation and investor sentiment.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss their recent experiences, including a flight to Croatia and the current state of the crypto market. They delve into various topics such as market trends, the impact of Western Union's blockchain partnerships, the competition between privacy coins like Zcash and Monero, insights from the Cosmoverse conference, and the excitement surrounding NFTs and new opportunities in the crypto space. They also touch on the MetaMask farming campaign and the Mega ETH sale, exploring the dynamics of market manipulation and investor sentiment.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Western Union?

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Hunting for Wins
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics related to the current state of the crypto market, including market trends, specific cryptocurrencies like Zcash, and the upcoming MegaETH ICO. They also touch on trading strategies, the dynamics of NFTs, and the anticipated Monad airdrop. The discussion is interspersed with personal anecdotes and reflections on sports and family life.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics related to the current state of the crypto market, including market trends, specific cryptocurrencies like Zcash, and the upcoming MegaETH ICO. They also touch on trading strategies, the dynamics of NFTs, and the anticipated Monad airdrop. The discussion is interspersed with personal anecdotes and reflections on sports and family life.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Hunting for Wins

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Crime Season is in Full Effect
item.description:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various aspects of the cryptocurrency market, including current trends, investment strategies, and the implications of recent news such as CZ's pardon. They explore the role of institutional players like Robinhood, the excitement around solo mining, and the significance of prediction markets like Polymarket. The discussion also touches on the NFT landscape, the challenges faced by platforms like Tezos, and the intersection of sports scandals with crypto. Overall, the conversation provides insights into the evolving crypto landscape and the importance of transparency and community engagement.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary:
Summary

In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various aspects of the cryptocurrency market, including current trends, investment strategies, and the implications of recent news such as CZ's pardon. They explore the role of institutional players like Robinhood, the excitement around solo mining, and the significance of prediction markets like Polymarket. The discussion also touches on the NFT landscape, the challenges faced by platforms like Tezos, and the intersection of sports scandals with crypto. Overall, the conversation provides insights into the evolving crypto landscape and the importance of transparency and community engagement.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Crime Season is in Full Effect

item.title: Exit Liquidity - AI Trading Bots?
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss various topics related to the current state of the crypto market, including market metrics, trading strategies, and the challenges faced by Web3 infrastructure. They also explore new projects and opportunities in the crypto space, as well as the role of AI in trading and its current limitations. The discussion is filled with insights, personal trading experiences, and a light-hearted banter about coffee preferences and market trends.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk

The discussion is filled with insights, personal trading experiences, and a light-hearted banter about coffee preferences and market trends.

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Market Meltdown
item.description: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, analyzing trends, investment strategies, and the dynamics between Bitcoin and gold. They explore the rise of new altcoins, particularly Atone, and delve into the concept of creator coins, providing insights into potential investment opportunities. The discussion is filled with personal anecdotes, market predictions, and a light-hearted approach to navigating the complexities of crypto investing.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this engaging conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, analyzing trends, investment strategies, and the dynamics between Bitcoin and gold. They explore the rise of new altcoins, particularly Atone, and delve into the concept of creator coins, providing insights into potential investment opportunities. The discussion is filled with personal anecdotes, market predictions, and a light-hearted approach to navigating the complexities of crypto investing.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Market Meltdown

item.title: Exit Liquidity - Privacy Wars
item.description: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin and Ethereum prices, market sentiment, and the dynamics of meme coins. They delve into the emerging trend of privacy coins, exploring their significance, challenges, and the regulatory landscape surrounding them. The discussion highlights the importance of user experience in adopting privacy solutions and the potential future developments in the crypto space.
item.dc:creator: Trendy & Zerk
item.itunes:summary: In this conversation, Trendy and Zerk discuss the current state of the cryptocurrency market, focusing on Bitcoin and Ethereum prices, market sentiment, and the dynamics of meme coins. They delve into the emerging trend of privacy coins, exploring their significance, challenges, and the regulatory landscape surrounding them. The discussion highlights the importance of user experience in adopting privacy solutions and the potential future developments in the crypto space.
item.itunes:title: Exit Liquidity - Privacy Wars

item.description: Trendy and Zerk introduce themselves and why this is going to be your new favorite crypto podcast.
